description: The town square bustles with activity. Merchants hawk their wares beneath fluttering banners, and the cobblestones are worn smooth by countless footsteps.

descriptions.morning: Morning mist still clings to the cobblestones as vendors set up their stalls. The air smells of fresh bread and woodsmoke.
descriptions.night: The square is nearly empty. A lone watchman patrols with a lantern, and the banners hang limp in the still night air.

sub_npcs.description: counts copper coins with glazed eyes.
sniffs at a discarded fish bone.
